description_long: This house features a modern, compact design with a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. The exterior walls are clad in light, vertically-oriented wooden planks, giving it a contemporary yet rustic appearance. A wraparound wooden deck with black railings surrounds the structure, and a set of stairs leads up to the main double-door entryway. Large, rectangular windows are present on both levels, with a glass-paneled balcony on the upper floor, providing ample natural light and outdoor space. The house sits elevated on short supports, enhancing its visual separation from the ground. The overall look is clean and geometric, with a focus on functional outdoor living and simple, modern lines.
description: A modern, two-story house with a gable roof, light wood siding, large windows, and a wraparound deck with black railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main double-door entry, wooden steps, and the wraparound deck with black railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large upper window, the glass-paneled balcony, and the deck extending around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the glass-paneled balcony and the continuous wooden siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows stacked vertically and the deck with stairs visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with wooden steps, a small porch area, and black railing accents.
